docs: Add VMWare Workstation 25H2 docs, chore: restructure content (#41)

## Summary

Global restructuring and additions of content. Solved a few bugs, added
a new section about running VMWare Workstation 25H2 on Linux. Corrected
some typo's, moved content. etc.

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [x] `fix` — bug fix (broken link, incorrect command, layout issue)
- [x] `content` — update or improve existing content
- [x] `docs` — changes to CONTRIBUTING, README, or meta documentation
- [x] `chore` — maintenance (dependencies, config, CI/CD)

> [PR title and commit types must follow these standards — view the
contributing
guide](https://github.com/Stensel8/Zephyrus-Linux/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages)

## Checklist

- [x] PR title follows the commit convention (e.g. `fix: correct nmcli
command in eduroam guide`)
- [x] Both EN and NL versions updated (if applicable)
- [x] Media is in AVIF format (not PNG/JPG)
- [x] No broken image references (`/images/*.avif` all exist in
`static/images/`)
- [x] Tested locally with `hugo server`

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: swap mssql/server for azure-sql-edge on ARM64 hosts

The Azure Service Bus emulator depends on SQL Server, which has no ARM64
image. On Apple Silicon (and other ARM64 hosts), the mssql/server:2022-latest
container fails under QEMU with jemalloc address mapping errors.

Use Aspire's BeforeStartEvent to intercept the container model and swap the
image to azure-sql-edge:latest, which has native ARM64 support. The Service
Bus emulator works with either SQL engine.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix timer completion jiggle/glitch

- Auto-start break timer on work completion (sessionStart set immediately
  instead of null) — eliminates the null-gap frame where stale elapsed
  values caused nonsensical 00:00 / 100% progress flash
- Reset elapsed to 0 on null sessionStart in PomodoroBar (safety net)
- Break now counts down properly: work → break (auto) → work (auto)
  Standard pomodoro cycle, user can stop anytime

chore(deps): pin security overrides to exact resolved versions

Replace open-ended >=7.24.0 / >=3.4.0 ranges with the exact
versions currently resolved in package-lock.json (undici@7.24.2,
flatted@3.4.1) to avoid inadvertently pulling in future unvetted
releases via the overrides mechanism.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remediate Dependabot security alerts

- Bump @angular/core, @angular/compiler, and related runtime packages
  21.2.1 → 21.2.4 (fixes high-severity XSS in i18n attribute bindings,
  CVE GHSA advisories #27-#30)
- Bump @angular/build and @angular/material/@angular/cdk 21.2.1 → 21.2.2
  (latest available patch for tool/UI packages)
- Add overrides.undici >=7.24.0 (resolves CRLF injection, HTTP smuggling,
  and WebSocket overflow issues — Dependabot alerts #24, #25, #31;
  resolved to undici@7.24.2)
- Add overrides.flatted >=3.4.0 (resolves high-severity unbounded
  recursion DoS in flatted <3.4.0; resolved to flatted@3.4.1)

npm audit now reports 0 vulnerabilities.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Dashboard: move stats row below today's collection

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(logics): update pyavd API compatibility for v6.x (#68)

* fix(generator): update pyavd API usage for compatibility with pyavd 6.x

pyavd 6.0.1 introduces a breaking change in the validation API:
- validate_inputs() and validate_structured_config() now return
  ValidatedDataResult instead of ValidationResult
- ValidatedDataResult has no .failed attribute; use .validated_data is None
- Violations are accessed via .validation_result.violations (not .validation_errors)
- Deprecations are accessed via .validation_result.deprecations

Also bump pyavd dependency from 5.7.2 to 6.0.1 and regenerate uv.lock.

Closes #67
Supersedes #59

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(logics): fix remaining pyavd 6.x API compatibility issues

- Replace removed 'name_servers' with 'dns_settings.servers' in example
  inventories (AVD 6.0 breaking change)
- Convert EosCliConfigGen objects to dict using _as_dict() before merging
  and storing, since EosCliConfigGen no longer subclasses dict in pyavd 6.x
- Replace removed private pyavd.api._anta.get_minimal_structured_configs()
  with public pyavd.api.anta.AVDFabricData.from_structured_configs() API
- Update get_device_test_catalog() call to use fabric_data= parameter

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(logics): broaden exception catch in ANTA catalog generation

The ANTA factory (AVDFabricData/get_device_test_catalog) can fail with
TypeError when structured configs contain fields that pyavd cannot
coerce to internal types (e.g. in test mocks that return plain dicts
with string platform values).

Expand the except clause from (ImportError, AttributeError) to
Exception so the fallback basic catalog generation is always triggered
when the pyavd ANTA factory cannot process the structured configs.

Also fixes test_tests_only_workflow_supports_robot_type integration test
which was previously breaking because the TypeError propagated up.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: prevent duplicate notifications on timer complete

WidgetView was independently calling completeWorkSession(),
skipBreak(), and sending webview postMessage on timer completion
— duplicating PomodoroBar's logic. Both windows share the Zustand
store via BroadcastChannel, causing race conditions and double
desktop notifications.

Now only PomodoroBar (main window) handles:
- State transitions (completeWorkSession/skipBreak)
- Desktop notifications (webview postMessage)

Widget only displays the countdown and stops its interval when
time is up. State changes arrive via BroadcastChannel sync.
Manual controls (stop, skip break) still work from widget.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Plan form includes Type selector; PT plans default to 12 sessions
- Fees page plan dropdown shows 🏋️ icon for PT plans
- Invoice preview and payment records include '(PT)' suffix for PT plans
- Updated mapPlan to read 'type' from Supabase
- Updated upsert_gym_plan RPC to accept p_type parameter
- SQL migration: ALTER TABLE plans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS type TEXT DEFAULT 'Membership'

Co-authored-by: luoxiaojun1992 <6905700+luoxiaojun1992@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add SetEnvKeyReplacer so nested APP_* env vars are read correctly

Viper's AutomaticEnv() upper-cases keys as-is, producing APP_DATABASE.HOST
(with a literal dot) instead of APP_DATABASE_HOST. Without a replacer, the
env var lookup always fails and the default value (localhost) is used.

Fix: v.SetEnvKeyReplacer(strings.NewReplacer(".", "_"))

Also adds config_test.go with tests for env-var-only and default-value loading.

Co-authored-by: luoxiaojun1992 <6905700+luoxiaojun1992@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: scan report panel destroyed by updateLastScan textContent

Root cause: updateLastScan() used el.textContent which replaced ALL
child content including the scan-report-panel div. Now uses a text
node to update only the label text while preserving child elements.

Verified with Playwright: 14/14 tests pass — panel opens on click,
shows all 4 phases with status icons, task counts, retry info, error
details, duration, and warning indicator. Closes on second click.

commit.message:
Implement 13 critical gaps: backtester, odds engine, correlation modeling, rotation tracker, validators, logger, game log cache, rate limiter, st.cache_data, and system health dashboard

- engine/backtester.py: historical backtest engine (Monte Carlo vs game logs)
- engine/odds_engine.py: American odds ↔ probability, true edge, EV, vig
- engine/rotation_tracker.py: minutes trend/role-change tracking, trend factor
- engine/entry_optimizer.py: get_correlation_coefficient + calculate_parlay_probability_with_correlation
- engine/bankroll.py: odds_to_payout_multiplier (delegates to odds_engine)
- engine/minutes_model.py: add game_logs param to project_player_minutes
- data/validators.py: CSV structure, freshness, integrity, prop validation
- data/data_manager.py: st.cache_data decorators, clear_all_caches(), get_data_health_report()
- data/platform_fetcher.py: odds helper functions after _now_str()
- data/game_log_cache.py: persistent JSON cache for player game logs
- utils/logger.py: rotating-file + console structured logger
- utils/rate_limiter.py: token-bucket rate limiter with circuit breaker
- pages/12_📊_Backtester.py: Streamlit backtester UI
- app.py: System Health expander with data freshness metrics

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
